jobs.title: 2LoD Assurance Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>2LoD Assurance Manager</strong></p><p>GoCardless is the dominant bank-debit recurring-payments-as-a-service platform pioneered around the direct-debit data model.</p>

jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead GoCardless's Site Reliability function across the bank-payment platform stack & SME-fintech ecosystem.</p>
